mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, description, status, created_time, updated_time FROM book_category
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT id, name, description, status, created_time, updated_time FROM book_category WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_category (name, description, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{status})
